revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[Talk:Futakami Mountain]] redirect to enwiki [[Talk:Futakami Mountain]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:二上山); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/13088118 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:二上山 | revid=13088118 --> 平等な曖昧さ回避になっていますが、全国的には[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)]]の方が著名であると思います。[[二上山]]は[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)]]の内容にして、[[二上山 (富山県)]]へはOtherusesで誘導するという形にした方が良いと思います。<small>（念のため書いておきますが、私は富山県の二上山がよく見える所の出身です）</small>[[利用者:Nnh|nnh]] 2007年6月12日 (火) 15:52 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/13088118 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:二上山 | revid=13088118 --> 平等な曖昧さ回避になっていますが、全国的には[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)]]の方が著名であると思います。[[二上山]]は[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)]]の内容にして、[[二上山 (富山県)]]へはOtherusesで誘導するという形にした方が良いと思います。<small>（念のため書いておきますが、私は富山県の二上山がよく見える所の出身です）</small>[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2007年6月12日 (火) 15:52 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Futakami_Mountain here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Futakami_Mountain for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/13088118 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:34, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:二上山 | revid=13088118 --> 平等な曖昧さ回避になっていますが、全国的には[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)]]の方が著名であると思います。[[二上山]]は[[二上山 (奈良県・大阪府)]]の内容にして、[[二上山 (富山県)]]へはOtherusesで誘導するという形にした方が良いと思います。<small>（念のため書いておきますが、私は富山県の二上山がよく見える所の出身です）</small>[[User:Nnh|nnh]] 2007年6月12日 (火) 15:52 (UTC)
